title: Nullified Gear
description: Changes how tools look when equipped.
body:
Pre-1.21.4 versions of this pack require the mods JsonEM or EMJ. It was tested with JsonEM and based on shizotoaster's Ultimate Armor Patch. To check out shizotoaster's pack, click [HERE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimate-armor-patch). 

If you want me to edit anything just join my discord, linked somewhere on the page, and let me know there.
